title: lobelia polyphylla f. linearifolia
intro: Lobelia polyphylla f. linearifolia, also known as the 'Blue Lobelia', is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Lobelia polyphylla f. linearifolia include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be smoked for its medicinal effects.
